notes:
### Added

- Server: durable `video_jobs` table (survives `dntlicd` restart; 2h TTL prune)
- Desktop: hosted soft-limit from `X-DNT-Usage-Soft-Limit`; stable `quota_exceeded` copy

### Changed

- Alias dual-read off (`DualReadWires=false`); hosted chat accepts alias codes only

### Security / Server

- Bound JSON/chat request bodies; HTTP read timeouts
- Rate limit admin login/bootstrap and license activate (in-memory; single-process)
- Security headers + request id
- Production config rejects sample secrets; separate download secret (`DNTLIC_DOWNLOAD_SECRET`)
- SSRF guards on provider probe outbound URLs
- Admin password minimum length; login constant-work path
- Durable `video_jobs` across restart (Store + migration 004; TTL 2h)
